name: conf-mini-sites-forge
description: Conf Mini-Sites — Forge app shell (macro + resolver + Custom UI). Backend Workers live at the repo root.
comment: CommonJS (no type:module) — required for Forge's bundler to resolve @forge/resolver's default export.
scriptsComment: forge:install:prod uses --upgrade (idempotent: installs on first run, upgrades thereafter) plus --site/--product so it runs NON-INTERACTIVELY in CI; change --site once a production Confluence site exists. forge:deploy:prod must run before forge:install:prod.
